name: restaurant back office managers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For restaurant back office managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual tracking and reconciliation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: restaurant back office managers processing 10–20 invoices/month
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of supplier invoices and payments
